subject: [PATCH v5 13/18] mm/userfaultfd: add RWP fault delivery and expose UFFDIO_REGISTER_MODE_RWP

2026-05-26.patch_summary: This patch adds support for read-write protection (RWP) to the userfaultfd interface in the Linux kernel. It introduces a new fault delivery mechanism that triggers when a process attempts to access memory protected by RWP, and exposes a new UAPI command to register RWP mode. The patch also updates various kernel functions to handle RWP faults correctly. The goal is to provide userspace with a way to track and manage read-write protection for specific memory regions. The approach taken involves modifying the fault handling paths in the kernel to detect RWP-protected pages and dispatching UFFD_PAGEFAULT_FLAG_RWP messages through the userfaultfd interface. This allows userspace to resolve RWP faults using the UFFDIO_RWPROTECT command.
